name: sandaconda
flavor_texts: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened.
Its unique style of coiling allows it to blast sand out of its sand sac more efficiently.
text: Sandaconda is the Sand Snake Pokémon. It is a ground-type Pokémon. Abilities: sand-spit, shed-skin, sand-veil (hidden). Base stats — HP: 72, Attack: 107, Defense: 125, Sp. Atk: 65, Sp. Def: 70, Speed: 71. Evolution line: silicobra → sandaconda. Lore: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened. Its unique style of coiling allows it to blast sand out of its sand sac more efficiently.
